body: I know just what you mean shanti was the first to grab my attention, she had that extra quality she embodied everything the GGs were. Now comes Kevia and at first I was like oh this is not going to be good, but as I watched her I was like this girl brings a certain power to her dance and I like it, I like it a lot. Ms Kevia should teach a master class. Go Kevia go!!!

title: Alcorn State University S.O.D + Golden Girls (Marching In) Homecoming 2021
body: At all HBCU's they know how to strut their stuff righteously. But Alcorn really kills it here. Love the Black culture, its resilience and creativity, its innovative skills and adaptability, and I'm convinced that the oppressive policies of Jim Crow past and present paradoxically strengthened the Black community in so many ways.
